notes: All formulas (squares s^2, equilateral triangle (sqrt3/4)s^2, semicircle pi/8 s^2 with s as diameter, disc pi*integral R^2, washer pi*integral(R^2-r^2) with the explicit warning against (R-r)^2, shift-by-k radii) and every re-derived numeric answer (8, 8pi, 2pi/15, 256pi/5) are correct, axis/variable pairing is right, and no BC-only arc length content appears.
